DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:D.COSTELLO/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY MICHAEL ROSSOFF PRESENT WITH PLTF. DEFT MARUEEN MAHONEY, WHO APPEARED LATE, IS IN PRO- PER. CASE SETTLED; PLTF SUBMITTED STIPULATED JUDGMNT SIGNED BY PARTIES. ALL PARTIES INDICATE UNDERSTANDING & ACCEPTANCE OF TERMS OF SETTLMNT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAHONEY, JOANNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2320 31ST AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL JUL-09-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES BACK RENTS & DMGS THRU 6/30/96. NO FURTHER STAYS OR APPEALS. SECURITY DEPOSIT RETAINED BY PLTF. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & ATNYS FEES. ANY PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES BY DEFT BECOMES PROPERTY OF PLTF. MUTUTAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS.
